data.title: STOCKS | Analysis of Dow Jones Performance Under Trump Administration
data.description: Pam Bondi's comments on the stock market have raised questions, but insights from John Authers provide clarity. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the Dow Jones Industrial Average's performance during U.S. President Donald Trump's tenure. The analysis delves into market trends and economic factors influencing the stock index under Trump's leadership. Authers' examination offers a detailed look at how the Dow has responded to various policies and global events during this period. The report underscores the complexities of market dynamics and the impact of presidential decisions on financial markets.

data.title: Brother Machi sold some altcoins to go long on BTC, ETH, and HYPE again.
data.description: According to HyperInsight monitoring, Huang Licheng's ("Maji Dage") address sold some ETH and some altcoins from his wallet, and subsequently increased his holdings of BTC, ETH, and HYPE on Hyperliquid. His current holdings are as follows: • 25x long position of 6,200 ETH, opening price $2006.88, liquidation price $1847.69; • 40x long position of 25 BTC, opening price $68,645.90, liquidation price $33,872.44; • 10x long position of 55,000 HYPE, opening price $31.09, liquidation price $14.44.

data.title: Binance Sees Liquidity Drain While Bitcoin Inflows Rise
data.description:
According to a recent report shared by CryptoQuant, Binance’s 30-day netflow data is showing a notable divergence across major assets. Stablecoins and Ethereum are leaving the exchange, while Bitcoin is moving in, a combination that creates a mixed but structurally important signal for the broader market. $6
source: https://www.ethnews.com/binance-sees-liquidity-drain-while-bitcoin-inflows-rise/

data.title: Ignition Gains Most Influential Followers on X
data.description:
Ignition, a liquidity staking infrastructure, has emerged as the project with the most new influential followers on X over the past week. According to ChainCatcher, data from the Web3 asset data platform RootData X indicates that prominent figures such as IcoBeast.eth (@icobeast), 2Lambroz (@2lambro), and 小捕手 CHAOS (@iamyourchaos) have recently started following the project.

Other projects that have attracted a significant number of influential followers on X include predict.fun and Echelon Market.

data.title: Philippine digital bank Maya is exploring an IPO in the United States.
data.description: Philippine digital bank Maya is exploring an initial public offering (IPO) in the United States, planning to raise up to $1 billion. The company is currently working with advisors to advance the deal. Maya holds a digital banking license issued by the Central Bank of the Philippines and offers savings accounts, consumer loans, payments, and merchant services through its app. In addition to its core banking business, Maya also offers in-app cryptocurrency trading services under a regulated virtual asset service provider framework. Choosing a US listing could provide Maya with a deeper capital pool and a broader institutional investor base. Local observers say investors will weigh the company's banking fundamentals against its crypto compliance.

data.title: Foreign media: Musk has an nearly 80% chance of becoming the world's first trillionaire this year.
data.description: According to the latest Forbes billionaires list, Tesla CEO Elon Musk's personal wealth is approaching $850 billion. Furthermore, according to predictions from the Kalshi platform, he has a 78% chance of becoming the world's first trillionaire this year. Watcher.Guru, writing on the X platform, stated that Musk claims to have less than $850 million in cash, representing only 0.1% of his net worth.

data.title: Data: Over $2 billion in ETH short positions are concentrated above $2200.
data.description: Cointelegraph reported that despite a roughly 20% drop in ETH price in February, on-chain data indicates that investors continued to accumulate. In February, ETH addresses added over 2.5 million ETH, bringing total holdings to 26.7 million. Regarding network fundamentals, over 30% of the circulating ETH supply (37,228,911 ETH) is currently staked. Weekly transaction volume reached a record high of 17.3 million, while the median gas fee dropped to $0.008. In the derivatives market, ETH open interest reached $11.2 billion, with the estimated leverage ratio remaining high at 0.7. Hyblock data shows that 73% of global accounts are currently long on ETH. The liquidation heatmap shows over $2 billion in short positions clustered above $2200, while approximately $1 billion in long liquidation positions are piled up around $1800. The most recent cluster of liquidations is at $1909, where there are $563 million worth of long positions. Technical charts show ETH forming an "Adam and Eve" bottom pattern; a break above $2150 could see it rise to the $2473-$2634 range.

data.title: Kusuri no Aoki Holdings' Shareholders Back Takeover Defense
data.description: Kusuri no Aoki Holdings' shareholders have approved a takeover defense measure during an extraordinary shareholders' meeting. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move strengthens the founding family's efforts to maintain control against the company's largest external shareholders. The decision marks a significant step in the ongoing battle for influence within the company, as the founding family seeks to secure its position amidst external pressures.

data.title: EU Advisers Say Current Spectrum Sufficient for 6G
data.description:
EU spectrum advisers said existing harmonised bands are sufficient to support 6G rollout by 2030, urging better use of underutilised high-frequency spectrum and sharing solutions.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/telecom/eu-advisers-say-current-spectrum-sufficient-for-6g/

data.description:
A U. S. venue could offer deeper capital access as investors weigh the bank’s regulated crypto business against its core banking operations.
source: https://decrypt.co/358255/philippines-digital-bank-maya-us-1b-ipo

data.title: Ethereum Price Near Technical Flashpoint With Big Move Brewing
data.description:
Ethereum price found support near $1,928 and recovered some losses. ETH is now consolidating and faces key hurdles near $2,020. Ethereum is attempting a fresh recovery wave above $1,950. The price is trading below $2,020 and the 100-hourly Simple Moving Average
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/eth/ethereum-price-near-flashpoint-2020/

data.title: Wang Yongli: Using crypto assets such as Bitcoin to re-anchor currency is a misunderstanding of the laws governing monetary development.
data.description: In his article "Where Does the Huge Increase in Currency Come From?", Wang Yongli, former vice president of the Bank of China, pointed out that modern currency has completely transformed from a metallic standard paper money to one that is no longer anchored to any specific tradable wealth. Monetary theory and practice have fully demonstrated that anchoring to any specific wealth will inevitably cause the total amount of money to be difficult to change with the total value of tradable wealth, and will severely restrict or hinder exchange and economic and social development due to currency shortages. Therefore, returning to the metallic standard or finding a new anchor for currency (such as crypto assets like Bitcoin, rare earths, energy, etc.) are misunderstandings of the nature of currency and its development laws.

data.title: Crypto lending platform Nexo returns to the US market
data.description: According to Businesswire, crypto lending platform Nexo has announced its official return to the US market in 2026. Aiming to provide a framework compliant with US regulations for its investment and lending products, its digital asset trading infrastructure is reportedly provided by Bakkt. As part of its US operations, Nexo has launched a comprehensive suite of digital asset services designed to support advanced portfolio management and liquidity needs.

data.title: Harvard University reduced its BTC holdings by 20% and added $86 million in ETH holdings in Q4.
data.description: Harvard University's latest holdings data shows that compared to the third quarter of 2025, it reduced its BTC holdings by 20% in the fourth quarter of 2025, while adding ETH holdings worth $86 million. Harvard University's previous two BTC purchases were both at prices above $100,000. The average ETH price in the fourth quarter of 2025, when the report was submitted, was above $4,000, while the current ETH price is $1,800.

data.title: STOCKS | India's Earnings Recovery and IT Stock Contrarians Highlighted
data.description: India's financial markets are witnessing a budding recovery in earnings, according to a recent analysis. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the emergence of contrarians within the IT stock sector, which could influence market dynamics. Additionally, concerns are rising over potential risks to domestic liquidity, which may impact the broader economic landscape. These developments are crucial for investors and analysts monitoring India's market trends.

data.title: Prices of many traditional financial assets fell, with gold and crude oil weakening.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fluctuated to $4,960 per ounce, a daily decrease of 0.63%. Silver prices changed to $75.9 per ounce, a daily increase of 0.05%. Regarding volatility indices, the BVIX (BTC volatility index) was last at 52.52, down 0.36% on the day; the EVIX (ETH volatility index) was last at 69.67, down 0.53% on the day. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 0.17% to $63.59 per barrel; Brent crude oil fell 0.14% to $68.65 per barrel.

data.title: Wintermute Launches Institutional OTC Trading for Tokenized Gold
data.description:
Digital asset market maker Wintermute has introduced institutional over-the-counter (OTC) trading for tokenized gold products, expanding its footprint into on-chain commodities. The new desk focuses on the two largest gold-backed tokens by market capitalization: Pax Gold (PAXG) and Tether Gold(XAUT).
source: https://www.ethnews.com/wintermute-launches-institutional-otc-trading-for-tokenized-gold/

data.title: U.S. Engages in Talks with Cuba Amid Economic Challenges
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that American government representatives are in dialogue with Cuba's Communist leadership. Bloomberg posted on X that these discussions come as Cuba grapples with deteriorating economic circumstances. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is among the officials involved in these talks, aiming to address the island nation's financial difficulties.
